## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare speakers for an upcoming panel on "AI-Native Distribution for CMOs" by discussing key topics and coordinating content.](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agents in B2B marketing are still primarily used for research/evaluation rather than autonomous buying](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Companies are rethinking entire go-to-market strategies to incorporate AI/agents, from content creation to buyer journeys](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [There's debate around the definition of "agents" - ranging from deterministic workflows to fully autonomous systems](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Governance, trust, and auditing of AI systems are critical concerns as adoption increases](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Topics

### Speaker Introductions & Company AI Use Cases

  - [Omer (Salespeak): Focusing on improving B2B buying experience through intelligent conversations](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Kevin (Tebra): Reorienting entire go-to-market team to embrace agents, rethinking buying journey](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Marcel (Growthx.ai): Built coding agent for agentic workflows, powering content/growth for major brands](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Tooba (Amoeba.ai): Using neurosymbolic AI to analyze data and provide actionable insights for businesses](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Agents in B2B Buying Process

  - [Not yet seeing autonomous B2B buying agents, but expected in near future (3 months to 2 years)](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Buyers using ChatGPT/Claude as personal research agents](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic converting 3-5x higher than brand traffic for some companies](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Shift from SEO to "GEO" (Generative Engine Optimization) becoming crucial](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Agents as Distribution

  - [Still mostly reactive rather than proactively distributing content/offers](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Some companies building towards agent-to-agent distribution in roadmaps](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Example: Simulating ad performance through agent interactions before running actual campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Agents as Interface

  - [Companies rethinking website strategies to cater to both human and machine visitors](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Focus on providing elevated, personalized experiences through AI](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Shift from gatekeeping (e.g., SDRs, forms) to open, AI-powered interactions](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

### Agents as Operators

  - [Amoeba.ai focuses on discovering useful data insights and recommending actions](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Growthx.ai orchestrates strategy, content creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Challenge: achieving human-level quality or better before automating processes](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

### Governance and Trust

  - [Need for establishing trust before full automation/orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [Importance of auditing mechanisms and periodic testing](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Potential new role emerging: agent orchestrator/owner within companies](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)

### Impact on Team Structure

  - [Shift towards "experience engineers" in marketing roles](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Growth/demand generation taking lead in AI orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [New skills required: AI/ML, data science, prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)

### Future Predictions

  - [Mixed opinions on B2B buying agents within 12-24 months](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [Shift from predictive to prescriptive insights expected](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Potential for AI-native companies to leapfrog incumbents in certain areas](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Speakers to promote the upcoming session/conference](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)
  - [Lisa to review meeting recording and provide additional input](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2607.0)
  - [Carilu to integrate Lisa's perspective into the panel structure](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Finalize panel content and coordinate any follow-up discussions as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zZKQriwXp_v9H4-GJq-Ncxr2yY5ftpoE?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)
